benefits: Earn and redeem across all member airlines
Gold status gives lounge access across alliance
Priority boarding and baggage for elite members
Star Alliance.indian_relevance: Air India is the only Indian Star Alliance member. KrisFlyer and United MileagePlus are key programs for India-based travelers.

benefits: Avios is the shared currency (BA, Qatar, Iberia)
Emerald status gives first class lounge access
Qatar and Cathay are top choices from India
Distance-based Avios chart great for short-haul
Oneworld.indian_relevance: No Indian airline in Oneworld. British Airways Avios and Qatar are primary for India routes.

benefits: Flying Blue covers Air France + KLM
Good coverage to Europe via CDG/AMS
SkyTeam.indian_relevance: No Indian airline in SkyTeam. Flying Blue is excellent for India-Europe redemptions via Air France/KLM.
